case_title: SONDRA OSORI VS. JOHN DAVID VESKO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORI, SONDRA SERVED JUN-21-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT U-HUAL OF CALIFORNIA
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR SEP-10-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. APR-16-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) JOHN DAVID VESKO; OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT , CONDITIONAL, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORI, SONDRA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-16-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JOHN DAVID VESKO; OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-10-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORI, SONDRA AS TO DEFENDANT VESKO, JOHN DAVID U-HUAL OF CALIFORNIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-14-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-10-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-30-2012
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
